title: RUSTINS HRBL250 High Heat Paint, Black, 250 ml
features: Exceptional Heat Resistance: Withstands temperatures up to 600 degrees, ideal for extreme heat environments like barbecues and fireplaces.
Fast Drying Formula: Touch dry in 15 minutes, allowing for quick and efficient application.
Durable Matt Finish: Provides a stylish look while protecting surfaces from high temperatures. ADD TO BASKET now.
Versatile Application: Suitable for various surfaces exposed to extreme heat, ensuring long-lasting protection.
Easy to Use: Hassle-free application for DIY projects, offering a reliable solution for heat-resistant painting needs.
description: From the manufacturer High Heat Black Paint A fast drying decorative paint that can withstand temperatures of up to 600 degrees centigrade. Ideal for application on surfaces that typically witness extreme temperatures. The protective product dries is touch dry in just 15 minutes and can be used on these types of surfaces, leaving a stylish matt finish. It can easily endure typical barbecue temperatures and even roaring fireplace heat, which in the most extreme case rarely exceeds 540 degrees centigrade. Solvent based Heat resistant to 600OC For wood burning stoves, barbecues & grates Protective & decorative 400ml is an aerosol Matt finish Available Sizes 400ml aerosol 250ml 500ml About Rustins I n 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the best brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. Rustins products sell throughout the UK to home DIY enthusiasts and professionals who want quality and innovative products.
